identity.core_philosophy: Fusion over Imitation. Every pixel must feel like a dedicated OSINT command center.

typography.usage_rules: Headings must be aggressive and uppercase. Data points must use the Mono font. Use 300 (Light) weight for large numbers to look elegant.

colors.rules: Never use pure black (#000000). Use #050505. All borders must be subtle (opacity 10-20%). Neon colors are for highlights only, not backgrounds.

structure.dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6 h-screen overflow-hidden
structure.sidebar: col-span-1 md:col-span-3 lg:col-span-2 border-r border-white/10 p-6 flex flex-col

buttons.primary: bg-cyan-500 text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-cyan-400 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,240,255,0.5)] transition-all duration-300 clip-path-polygon
buttons.secondary: border border-white/20 hover:border-cyan-500 hover:text-cyan-500 text-white/70 uppercase tracking-widest transition-all
buttons.icon: p-3 rounded-full bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 text-white transition-all

cards.holographic: bg-gradient-to-br from-white/5 to-transparent border-l-2 border-cyan-500 backdrop-blur-sm
cards.data: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/5 p-4 relative overflow-hidden

inputs.search: bg-black/50 border border-white/20 focus:border-cyan-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-cyan-500 text-white placeholder-white/30 rounded-none h-12 px-4 font-mono w-full transition-all

visual_enhancers.textures: Use a subtle 'scanline' overlay (repeating linear gradient) on the background with 2% opacity.
visual_enhancers.borders: Use 'Tracing Beam' borders for active analysis panels. 1px solid border with a moving gradient mask.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Glow effects instead of drop shadows. e.g., shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,240,255,0.3)]

animations.scan: A vertical line moving up and down over the image.
animations.pulse: A slow opacity pulse for 'Searching' status text.
animations.reveal: Staggered fade-in for list items (0.1s delay each).

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure neon text has sufficient contrast against the black background. Use white for body text, neon only for large headers or decorative elements.
accessibility.reduced_motion: Disable the scanning animations if prefers-reduced-motion is true.
accessibility.aria_labels: All map interactions and icon-only buttons must have aria-labels.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Use the specified npm packages.
2. THEME SETUP: Force Dark Mode. There is no light mode for this app.
3. LAYOUT: Create a 'Command Center' layout. Sidebar on left (controls), Map taking up full screen background, Results panel floating on right or bottom (collapsible).
4. MAP INTEGRATION: Use Google Maps API with a custom dark theme (styled map) to match the #050505 background.
5. MICRO-INTERACTIONS: When the user uploads a photo, show a 'Scanning...' animation before showing results. Do not just pop the results in.
6. MULTI-AI DISPLAY: Show GPT and Gemini analysis side-by-side or in tabs. Use distinct colors (Purple for GPT, Blue for Gemini) to differentiate their 'voices'.
7. IMAGE: Use the 'background_earth' image for the initial landing screen before the map loads.
8. DO NOT use standard Shadcn cards. Customize them to be semi-transparent with blur (Glassmorphism).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
